hero.name: Esneider Ríos
hero.title: Statistician
hero.subtitle: I blend statistical analysis with software development to create tools that extract real value from complexity.

about.title: About Me
about.description: With more than ten years of hands-on experience running my own businesses across commercial, administrative, and financial domains, I offer a well-rounded perspective that blends quantitative analysis with real-world business know-how. I specialize in Bayesian analysis, mixed linear models, machine learning, and time series. I build production-ready Shiny and web apps (Next.js). I'm also a LegalTech expert, focusing on jurimetrics and predictive legal intelligence systems.

aboutPage.title: About Me
aboutPage.role: Statistician · Full Stack Developer · LegalTech Expert
aboutPage.bio1: With more than a decade of hands-on experience leading my own businesses in commercial, administrative, and financial areas, I bring a holistic perspective that blends quantitative analysis with practical business understanding.
aboutPage.bio2: I specialize in Bayesian analysis, mixed linear models, machine learning, and time series. I build production-ready Shiny and web applications (Next.js). LegalTech expert with a focus on jurimetrics and predictive legal intelligence systems.
aboutPage.edu_unal_desc: Statistical modeling, data processing and interpretation, trend and behavior analysis, and insights for decision-making, alerts, and projections in business and process control environments.
aboutPage.edu_academlo_desc: End-to-end web application design and development: back-end with Node.js, Express, and NestJS; front-end with HTML, CSS, Tailwind, ReactJS, and Next.js.
aboutPage.teaching_p1: Beyond my data analysis projects, I've designed several interactive courses in webapp format, available in the Portfolio section.
aboutPage.teaching_p2: I've given private lessons to students from other fields (health, law, engineering), and to organize that content and share it easily online, I turn it into interactive webapp-style courses.
